findings.location: how-to-use — CheckRoleLoggerによるアノテーション設定の確認
findings.description: The source includes a concrete log output example (the actual log text block showing the tab-separated format starting with '2023-01-11 14:29:31.643 -DEBUG- nablarch.common.authorization.role.CheckRoleLogger ...') and the log output table has a third column '出力例' with concrete example values (e.g., class: 'com.nablarch.example.app.web.action.ProjectUploadAction', signature: 'upload(...)', role: 'ADMIN', anyOf: 'false'). The knowledge file's table only has '要素' and '説明' columns — the '出力例' column and the concrete log text example are omitted. These help users verify their setup and understand the output format.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST: code-block:: text showing the actual log output; list-table with widths: 1, 5, 10 and header '出力例' column containing concrete example values for each element

findings.description: The source '使用方法' h2 section contains 7 distinct h3-level subsections (コンポーネントを定義する, interceptorsOrderに追加する, ロールを定義する, ユーザのロールを保存する, アクションのメソッドにアノテーションでロールを割り当てる, アノテーションに割り当てた CheckRole の設定を一覧で確認する, プログラムで判定する, JSPで判定する) and is well over 2000 characters of plain text, but the knowledge file maps all of this into a single 'how-to-use' section without splitting.
